title: Fix Medication Review feedback-eval mechanical missing-context failures
description: Investigate repeated missing_required_context / empty processed_input failures surfaced in Medication Review split-score feedback evaluations, especially Individual Confirmation, Dosage, and Prescriber, and restore stable evaluation inputs before further rubric tuning.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Investigating RCA false mechanical flags: missing_required_context is being inferred when processed_input_text is empty even though raw_input_text exists. Implementing deterministic guardrails in rca_analysis classification + tests.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Patched RCA classifier: missing_required_context now requires objective signal (missing keys/fetch error/marker or no primary input), not LLM flag alone. Added regression tests and ran pytest plexus/rca_analysis_test.py (24 passed).
